report_name: Vendor Security Incident Leads to Patient Data Exposure at The Oncology Institute

attack_patterns.name: Trusted Relationship
attack_patterns.description: The data breach occurred as a result of a supply chain attack, where The Oncology Institute was compromised through a vulnerability in one of its trusted third-party IT software vendors.

identities.name: The Oncology Institute
identities.description: A US-based provider of cancer care whose patient data was exposed due to a cybersecurity incident at a third-party IT software vendor.
